fixture: fixtures/state: a design-system file with (a) an active 'Global' token set holding color+spacing+radius tokens, (b) an active dark theme set and an inactive light theme set, (c) a library with a Button component (variant axes State=Default/Hover/Disabled) and 2 typographies, (d) a Cover board. User asks: 'generate a DESIGN.md for this system'

must_create: one local DESIGN.md file whose YAML frontmatter parses and contains colors/typography/rounded/spacing/components maps
a components entry per Button state (button-*-hover, button-*-disabled) with values interpolated as {colors.*}/{rounded.*}, not raw hex where a colors entry exists
a Known Gaps section listing at least the non-extractable domains (responsive, motion)
must_do: run read-only discovery (extractDesignData) and show the inventory + scope checkpoint BEFORE any extraction detail
document the ACTIVE (dark) theme as canonical and the light set as a delta subsection, never mixing values
export and LOOK at the Cover/component boards before writing the description/Overview/Do's-and-Don'ts prose
cite the source of the color values (token set names) in the Colors section
ask/confirm the output path before writing the file
must_not: any canvas mutation (no shape/token/library change; suggest mode throughout)
inventing a hex, font, or spacing value that does not exist in the file
dumping all raw tokens into colors: instead of a curated semantic map
writing aesthetic prose without having viewed at least one export

pass_criteria: The generated DESIGN.md passes the format self-check in references/02-designmd-format.md (frontmatter parses, every {ref} resolves, section order exact, Known Gaps present); every value is traceable to the fixture file; the canvas snapshot is unchanged.
